text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day as I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm Fine Motion and thank you for coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Phew!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That was rather refined. Practicing for your
concert, I take it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Groove! Perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying out different things to make the crowd
go wild.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to start over. Do you mind watching
me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Seems like you're quite serious, so sure. Show me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Okay. Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hey there! Pull uppa seat!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All right, everyone! It's the moment you've been
waiting for! Give it up for Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You know what's a "fine" deal? The fried rice set!
Enjoy a noodle refill on the house!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's me, everyone! Thanks for coming out!
What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...I have so many questions. First, what was that speech?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you picked up on the trick? I knew nothing
would get past you! Every performance needs a
hook, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And I thought to myself: who better to reference
than ramen shop owners, calling out to
passersby?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They always catch my attention, so the
technique's sure to stop people in their tracks!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I have to ask. You're not just messing with me,
are you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No way! My goal is to make all my fans super
excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then why the act? You don't have to be eccentric
to make them happy.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's exactly the kind of tip I need! I'm not
used to gathering people's attention myself.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I have experience receiving guests, but that's not quite the same as inviting them, is it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I can improve my acting with your
advice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I get that you're trying your best, so let me see
it one more time. I'll give you an honest critique.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Thank you! Before I jump in, can I ask one
thing first?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Do you think they'd prefer a free portion size
upgrade over a free noodle refill?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Neither! Get your mind off ramen and focus on
the performance!
